chunks.title: Samuel's Self-Defense
chunks.reason: A dialogue where Samuel challenges the people to testify against his integrity and they confirm it.

chunks.title: Historical Review and Covenant Warning
chunks.reason: Samuel recounts Israel's history of deliverance and warns them about the consequences of obeying or rebelling against God.

chunks.title: The Sign of Thunder and Rain
chunks.reason: Samuel calls for a sign to prove God's displeasure, and Yahweh sends thunder and rain.

chunks.title: Final Charge to the People
chunks.reason: The people ask for prayer, and Samuel exhorts them to serve God faithfully while promising his continued intercession.
